allow: PowerShell($cmds = 'node','npx','python','py'; foreach\($c in $cmds\){ $p = \(Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if\($p\){ "$c -> $p" } else { "$c -> \(not found\)" } })
PowerShell(foreach \($t in 'python','py','python3'\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { "$t : $\($c.Source\)" } else { "$t : not found" } })

PowerShell($script = "C:\\Users\\abhis\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Dropt website\\.claude\\serve-lan.ps1"; Start-Process -FilePath "powershell" -ArgumentList "-NoProfile","-ExecutionPolicy","Bypass","-File","`"$script`"" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; "---LOCAL---"; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8080/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\).StatusCode } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; "---LAN---"; try { $r=\(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://192.168.1.7:8080/pricing.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5\); "$\($r.StatusCode\) len=$\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
